name: Communications Failure Response
description: Activated when primary communication channels (TCP/WiFi) fail. Degrades through mesh, LoRa, and Morse fallbacks while maintaining coordination.

steps.action: Detect which communication modes are still operational
Switch message bus to best available degraded mode (LoRa > Morse)
steps.note: All messages must fit 512-byte TRDAP limit on mesh mode

steps.action: Bypass normal message routing — switch to flood/broadcast mode for critical messages
steps.justification: Communication degradation requires broader message propagation to ensure delivery

steps.action: Broadcast PING to all known hubs to rebuild peer table
Activate Morse beacons on all hubs with optical/audio capability
Agents operate on last-known protocols until comms restored. Cache decisions locally.
When comms restore, SYNC cached state with all reachable peers
Log outage duration, degraded mode operations, and any autonomous decisions made
